response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive software engineering experience, strong architectural skills, and a proven track record in testing and mentoring, he falls significantly short of the core technical requirements for this role. Specifically, he lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, and his background is primarily in full-stack web development and DLang rather than low-level cloud compute infrastructure and hardware architecture.
strengths: Strong background in software design, architecture, and testing methodologies like TDD.
Experience building and scaling distributed microservices capable of handling high traffic.
Demonstrated passion for mentoring and knowledge sharing through workshops and open-source projects.
concerns: Significantly lacks the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming experience.
Core expertise aligns more with full-stack web development rather than internal cloud compute infrastructure.
Lacks dedicated technical leadership experience specifically focused on mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers.
